title: Fluorescent immunochemistry
steps: - Citrisolv Contributed by users 00:05:00 - Citrisolv Contributed by users 00:10:00 - Ethanol 100° 00:03:00 - Ethanol 95° 00:03:00 - Ethanol 75° 00:03:00
Microwave for 3 x 00:04:00 with microwaving solution (kept @ 4 °C ) Let it cool On ice until Room temperature
Permeabilization with TBS 1x; 0.1 % (v/v) Triton 100 (20 min @ Room temperature )
Anti Insulin (Guinea Pig) 1/800 Anti Ki67 (Rabbit) 1/200 ( Overnight @ 4 °C )
Wash with TBS 1 x; 0.1% Tween, rocking (3 x 00:05:00 )
Anti Guinea Pig-FITC 1/800 Anti Rabbit-Cy3 1/200 ( 02:00:00, minimum @ Room temperature )
Wash with TBS 1 x; 0.1% Tween, rocking (3 x 00:05:00 )
Coverslip with antifading agent mounting media with or without DAPI Use Anti-fading Mounting Media
Microwaving solution: 9 mL Citric Acid 0.01 M 41 mL Sodium Citrate 0.01 M 450 mL H 2 O
creator: Corentin Cras-Méneur
